reviews.comment:
Es el ACA. Pocas veces tan pocos autos esperando. Tienen la App YPF.

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA. It's rare to see so few cars waiting. They have the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bU0tN3VRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy 17/01/21 siendo las 23:00hs le pedí al chico que me atendió el cual no tenía su credencial que lo identifica! Bueno!! Le pedí si me limpiaba el parabrisa! Y me dijo que no!! Que no era su trabajo!! Y la NAFTA más cara aca en Gesell...gracias..

(Translated by Google)
Today, January 17, 2021, at 11:00 PM, I asked the guy who served me—who didn't have his ID badge!—if he would clean my windshield! And he said no! That it wasn't his job! And the gas is the most expensive here in Gesell... thanks a lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cUltTmdRRRAB
